lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint and body are flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is immaculate and shows no signs of wear. All mechanical components, including the engine and transmission, operate perfectly. It has been meticulously maintained and requires no repairs.

This vehicle is in impeccable, showroom-quality condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior paint is absolutely flawless, retaining its original deep luster with no chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the leather upholstery remains supple and unmarked, and all electronic components and accessories function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in top-tier state, with a smooth-running engine and a transmission that shifts seamlessly. With exceptionally low mileage and a full service history, a buyer can expect a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just left the assembly line. It requires absolutely no immediate maintenance or repairs.

Adventure awaits with this reliable daily driver! While it shows some honest character and typical signs of use from its time on the road, it remains a functional and steady performer. This is a fantastic opportunity to own a dependable vehicle that's ready to get you where you need to go!
This vehicle is in fair condition. It has visible cosmetic wear on the interior and exterior. The mechanical components are functional but show signs of significant use and may require repairs.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The exterior shows its age with several large dents, noticeable rust spots on the rocker panels, and heavily oxidized paint. Under the hood, the engine suffers from a persistent oil leak and a rough idle, while the brakes are nearing the end of their life. The interior has seen better days, with significant tearing on the upholstery, a cracked dashboard, and a non-functional radio. This car is recommended for someone looking for a major project or a source of parts, and it is sold strictly as-is.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been meticulously maintained to ensure peak mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a refined driving experience and a comprehensive service history, it represents a superior value proposition for the discerning motorist who prioritizes both reliability and performance.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and let me tell you, it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained over the years. Whether you're commuting to work or heading out on a weekend road trip, this car is ready to go and runs like a dream. It’s got a lot of life left in it and I’d love to see it go to a great new home. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'm happy to chat!

This E92 M3 is a purist’s specimen featuring the high-revving S65 naturally aspirated 4.0L V8, characterized by its eight individual throttle bodies and an 8,400 RPM redline. The powertrain is mated to a 7-speed M Double-Clutch Transmission (M-DCT) with Drivelogic, delivering torque to the rear wheels via an M Variable Differential Lock. Technical highlights include an aluminum multi-link rear suspension and Electronic Damping Control (EDC) for precise kinematic adjustment. Significant preventative maintenance has been addressed, including rod bearing replacement and refreshed throttle actuators, ensuring the high-strung valvetrain maintains peak volumetric efficiency. The chassis remains stiff and responsive, offering the tactile feedback and mechanical harmony expected of an M-engineered platform. Minor cosmetic wear is present, but the drivetrain and subframe integrity are excellent.
Used car in good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday reliability. Finished in a deep metallic paint that retains its luster, the exterior shows only minor signs of careful use, consistent with a vehicle that has been garaged and well-cared for. Inside, the cabin remains a clean sanctuary; the premium upholstery is free of tears, and all electronic features—from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—function flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is turn-key ready, boasting a comprehensive service history with recent fluid changes and a fresh set of tires. The engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts with precision, providing a confident and comfortable driving experience for its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a sophisticated aesthetic presence, this unit has undergone a comprehensive professional inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and reliability. A dependable selection for those who prioritize quality and value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent care and mechanical integrity, the automobile offers a refined driving experience and a well-preserved aesthetic. Having passed our comprehensive quality assessment, it stands as a testament to enduring engineering and remains prepared for immediate, reliable service.

Hey there! I’m selling my reliable ride and it’s honestly such a gem. It’s been well-taken care of and is in really solid shape, perfect for your daily commute or a fun weekend road trip! It runs smoothly and looks great inside and out. I’m sad to see it go, but I know it’ll make the next owner super happy. Come check it out and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a recently serviced double VANOS system. Power is delivered through a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis has been proactively addressed with subframe reinforcement and upgraded with Bilstein dampers for improved compression and rebound characteristics. Riding on staggered forged alloys with fresh Michelin Pilot Sport 4S tires, this vehicle offers precise turn-in and exceptional mechanical grip. A well-sorted driver’s car that prioritizes performance integrity and drivetrain longevity.
Used car in good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minor surface scratches. Ready for daily use.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily reliability, having been meticulously maintained throughout its life. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though minor stone chips on the hood and a small scuff on the rear bumper reflect its honest history on the road. Inside, the cabin is a testament to careful ownership; the premium upholstery is free of rips or stains, and the dashboard remains crack-free. Every feature, from the responsive infotainment system to the heated seats, operates flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs quietly and the transmission shifts with precision, supported by a recent full-service inspection and brand-new tires. This is a solid, well-cared-for example that offers a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

Presented for your consideration is a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and sustained performance. This unit has been curated to meet our rigorous standards, ensuring a reliable and sophisticated driving experience for its next proprietor. A premier opportunity to acquire a well-maintained asset at a competitive valuation.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing an exceptional balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has been curated for the discerning driver who values consistent performance and a documented history of responsible ownership. With its refined interior and robust powertrain, this vehicle represents a premier opportunity within its class, ensuring both reliability and a sophisticated presence on the road.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a reliable companion. It’s in great shape and ready for its next adventure! It drives smoothly, looks sharp, and has been really well-loved over the years. I’ve taken good care of it, and I’m sure you’re going to love getting behind the wheel as much as I have. Feel free to reach out—I’d love to see it go to a great home!

This E90 M3 features the high-revving S65 naturally aspirated V8, delivering linear power through a crisp 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis maintains its composure thanks to EDC-equipped dampers and refreshed bushings. Recent preventative maintenance includes reinforced rod bearings and updated throttle actuators, ensuring the VANOS system operates within factory tolerances. With a M-
Reliable vehicle. Good condition. Engine runs smooth. Clean interior. Minor exterior scratches.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and everyday utility. The exterior finish remains vibrant, showing only minor, age-appropriate cosmetic wear that does not detract from its impressive curb appeal. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, featuring well-preserved upholstery and a full suite of functional electronics, including a responsive infotainment system and crisp climate control. Mechanically, the car is in solid shape, backed by a consistent service history that includes recent oil changes and a fresh set of all-season tires with deep tread. The engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts effortlessly, making it a dependable choice for any commute or weekend getaway. This is an honest, reliable car cared for by a detail-oriented owner.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this specimen offers a superior driving experience and a well-preserved interior. It stands as an exceptional acquisition for those who demand reliability without compromising on executive presence.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a robust powertrain and a refined interior, it offers a harmonious balance of performance and longevity. Every component has been professionally inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and aesthetic integrity. A sophisticated choice that delivers exceptional value and a commanding presence on the road.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that's ready for its next adventure? This beauty has been my faithful companion and it's still running like a champ! It’s in really solid shape—super clean inside and out, with just the usual character you’d expect from a car that’s actually been enjoyed. It drives like a dream and is just waiting for a new home. Come take it for a spin, I know you’re going to love it!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333 hp with razor-sharp throttle response via its individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double-VANOS variable valve timing. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal power
Well-maintained vehicle. Runs smooth. Clean interior. Minimal exterior wear. Title in hand.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and everyday utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the premium upholstery is free of tears or odors, and every electronic feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the infotainment system—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is in its prime. It has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer’s schedule, ensuring the engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts effortlessly. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection, confirming that the brakes and tires have plenty of life remaining. Whether you’re looking for a dependable daily commuter or a capable weekend cruiser, this car offers a refined driving experience and the peace of mind that comes from a history of responsible ownership.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and sustained value. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating strong mechanical integrity, it offers a refined driving experience and a well-preserved interior. An exemplary choice for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber automobile that has been treated with consistent care and professional oversight.
